# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: projects/myprojectid/buckets/myfirstgcpbucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties: {}
  
- name: 'instance'
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties: |
    zone = "us-central1" # replace with your preferred region and availability_zone (e.g., us-west2a) for better performance, you can also use a specific instance template here if needed  
    
    machineType = 'zones/' + zone + '/machineTypes/n1-standard-4'  #replace n1-standard-4 with your preferred type of VM (e.g., f2-micro) for better performance, you can also use a specific instance template here if needed  
    
    networkInterfaces = [{accessConfigs: [], name:'default',network:'global/networks/default'}] #replace default to the desired subnet and global networks (e.g., 'projects/{project}/global/networks/my-subnet')  for better performance, you can also use a specific instance template here if needed  
    
    disks = [{autoDelete: true, name:'default',boot:true}] #replace default to the desired disk type (e.g., 'pd-standard' or SSD) and boot flag as required by your preference  for better performance , you can also use a specific instance template here if needed  
    
    metadata = {fingerprint:"",items:[{key:'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#instancePrincipal',value:""}]} #replace with your preferred value for the http_ok and https_only fields (e.g., true or false)
    
    serviceAccounts = [{'email': 'default','scopes':['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform'] }]  # replace default to a valid email address if needed  
      
parameters: {}
